projectDescription: A macOS menu-bar app that lets you hold the Fn key to record voice input, transcribes it in real time using Apple Speech Recognition, and injects the text into any focused input field — with optional LLM refinement for improved accuracy.
keyFeatures: Hold Fn key to record voice, release to inject transcribed text
Real-time streaming transcription via Apple Speech Recognition
Floating capsule-shaped HUD with animated waveform visualization
Multi-language support: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean
LLM refinement via OpenAI-compatible API to fix speech recognition errors
CJK-aware text injection: temporarily switches to ASCII input source before pasting
Menu-bar only app (LSUIElement) — no Dock icon
Built with Swift Package Manager, distributed as a signed .app bundle
publicApiSurface: Fn key release — stop recording and inject text
Menu bar icon — access language settings and LLM refinement options
LLM Refinement submenu — enable/disable and open Settings
Settings window — configure API Base URL, API Key, Model; Test and Save
Language switcher — English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean
Makefile targets: build, run, install, clean
